channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Federal Appeals Court Upholds Illinois Semiautomatic Weapons Ban in Major Second Amendment Case
item.description:
A federal appeals court has upheld Illinois’ semiautomatic weapons ban, rejecting a Second Amendment challenge and keeping restrictions on AR-15-style rifles and high-capacity magazines in place.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/politics/illinois-semiautomatic-weapons-ban-upheld-federal-appeals-court-2026
